creator: usenet@ulrich-grey.de
text:
Created attachment 170153
webkit-gtk2 build log Symbols/MAKE_JOBS_UNSAVE

I built it again setting:
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
DEBUG=on

After about 20 hours the build stopped. Please see the attached log.

(19:08:17) ar: warning: can't mmap file: libWebCore_la-GResourceBundle.o: Cannot allocate memory
(19:08:17) ar: warning: Segmentation fault (core dumped)
(19:14:29) GNUmakefile:34037: recipe for target 'libWebCore.la' failed
(19:14:29) gmake[2]: *** [libWebCore.la] Error 139
(19:14:29) gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/webkit-gtk2/work/webkitgtk-2.4.11'
(19:14:29) GNUmakefile:25837: recipe for target 'all' failed
(19:14:29) gmake[1]: *** [all] Error 2
(19:14:29) gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/webkit-gtk2/work/webkitgtk-2.4.11'
(19:14:29) *** Error code 1
(19:14:29) 
(19:14:29) Stop.
(19:14:29) make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/webkit-gtk2

As far as I see no memory shortage:
